summary: Live PR inventory shard over five independent open PRs. No shared canonical was invented. No security-sensitive items were detected. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are disabled or blocked by job policy/preflight, so the result keeps related issue/PR lanes open and escalates only the PRs requiring maintainer or author follow-up before any mutation.

actions.reason: Keep open as the source issue for the related open PR lane.
Already closed; no mutation is valid.
Maintainer/author follow-up and technical correctness judgment are required; this inventory job cannot repair, merge, or close it.
Maintainer-owned active work should stay with the maintainer/author; no safe close or automated repair path is allowed in this job.
Keep open as the source issue while the linked PR remains unresolved.
Potentially viable PR, but unresolved review-comment proof and maintainer review are required before any merge/close path.
Active author proof is missing; keep for maintainer/author follow-up rather than closing or replacing.
Substantial focused PR with active author follow-up and review concerns; needs maintainer technical review, not inventory cleanup.

needs_human: #87814: Maintainer/author follow-up required for a focused compatibility-sensitive config command PR with failing relevant checks and review issues; branch is not maintainable by automation in this job.
#87850: Maintainer-owned/member PR with active status waiting on author and technical correctness/reproduction scope still requiring maintainer judgment.
#87861: Clean-looking contributor PR, but Copilot review comments are hydrated as unresolved and merge/fix are blocked; maintainer review is required.
#87863: Real behavior proof remains missing/failing for a QQ Bot message-delivery fix; author/maintainer follow-up required.
#87872: Larger Codex accounting PR has active author follow-up and prior review concerns; maintainer technical review required before any merge or close path.
